'''âzh-m-t''' ('''kazhamat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macarize|macarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macarize|macarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-m-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazhamat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhamat|thizhamat]] || [[word:jizhamat|jizhamat]] || [[word:shizhamat|shizhamat]] || [[word:kizhamat|kizhamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhamat|thuthuzhamat]] || [[word:jujuzhamat|jujuzhamat]] || [[word:shushuzhamat|shushuzhamat]] || [[word:kukuzhamat|kukuzhamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhamat|thuzhamat]] || [[word:juzhamat|juzhamat]] || [[word:shuzhamat|shuzhamat]] || [[word:kuzhamat|kuzhamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhamat|thuzhamat]] || [[word:juzhamat|juzhamat]] || [[word:shuzhamat|shuzhamat]] || [[word:kuzhamat|kuzhamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhamat|thezhamat]] || [[word:jezhamat|jezhamat]] || [[word:shezhamat|shezhamat]] || [[word:kezhamat|kezhamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhamat|thothozhamat]] || [[word:jojozhamat|jojozhamat]] || [[word:shoshozhamat|shoshozhamat]] || [[word:kokozhamat|kokozhamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhamat|thozhamat]] || [[word:jozhamat|jozhamat]] || [[word:shozhamat|shozhamat]] || [[word:kozhamat|kozhamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhamat|thozhamat]] || [[word:jozhamat|jozhamat]] || [[word:shozhamat|shozhamat]] || [[word:kozhamat|kozhamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhamat|thĂŠzhamat]] || [[word:jĂŠzhamat|jĂŠzhamat]] || [[word:shĂŠzhamat|shĂŠzhamat]] || [[word:kĂŠzhamat|kĂŠzhamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhamat|thathazhamat]] || [[word:jajazhamat|jajazhamat]] || [[word:shashazhamat|shashazhamat]] || [[word:kakazhamat|kakazhamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhamat|thazhamat]] || [[word:jazhamat|jazhamat]] || [[word:shazhamat|shazhamat]] || [[word:kazhamat|kazhamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhamat|thazhamat]] || [[word:jazhamat|jazhamat]] || [[word:shazhamat|shazhamat]] || [[word:kazhamat|kazhamat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhamat|shazhamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhamat|goshazhamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhamat|gokishazhamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhamatnĂŒ|shazhamatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamatnknĂŒ|goshazhamatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamatnĂŒ|gokishazhamatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhamatshĂ«|shazhamatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkshĂ«|goshazhamatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhamatshĂ«|gokishazhamatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamatro|shazhamatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkro|goshazhamatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamatro|gokishazhamatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamatmu|shazhamatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkmu|goshazhamatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamatmu|gokishazhamatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhamatsher|shazhamatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhamatnksher|goshazhamatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhamatsher|gokishazhamatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhamatng|shazhamatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkng|goshazhamatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhamatng|gokishazhamatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhamatya|shazhamatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkya|goshazhamatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhamatya|gokishazhamatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhamatyam|shazhamatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkyam|goshazhamatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhamatyam|gokishazhamatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamatnĂŒshĂ«|shazhamatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhamatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhamatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamatnĂŒro|shazhamatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamatnknĂŒro|goshazhamatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamatnĂŒro|gokishazhamatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamatnĂŒmu|shazhamatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamatnknĂŒmu|goshazhamatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamatnĂŒmu|gokishazhamatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamatshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhamatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhamatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhamatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamatshĂ«ro|shazhamatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkshĂ«ro|goshazhamatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamatshĂ«ro|gokishazhamatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamatshĂ«mu|shazhamatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkshĂ«mu|goshazhamatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamatshĂ«mu|gokishazhamatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamatronĂŒ|shazhamatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkronĂŒ|goshazhamatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamatronĂŒ|gokishazhamatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamatroshĂ«|shazhamatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkroshĂ«|goshazhamatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamatroshĂ«|gokishazhamatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhamatromu|shazhamatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkromu|goshazhamatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhamatromu|gokishazhamatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhamatmunĂŒ|shazhamatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkmunĂŒ|goshazhamatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhamatmunĂŒ|gokishazhamatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhamatmushĂ«|shazhamatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkmushĂ«|goshazhamatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhamatmushĂ«|gokishazhamatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhamatmuro|shazhamatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhamatnkmuro|goshazhamatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhamatmuro|gokishazhamatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|718161e}}
